info.description: Internal Developer Platform API for self-provisioning Kubernetes environments
info.title: IDP Core API

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token

get.description: Check if the API is running
List all API keys, optionally filtered by team

post.description: Create a new API key. The full key value is only returned once in this response.

get.description: Get a specific API key by ID

patch.description: Update an existing API key's metadata

get.description: List audit logs with filtering and pagination
Get a specific audit log entry
List all budgets for a team

post.description: Create a new budget with alert thresholds

get.description: Get a budget by ID
Get alert history for a budget
List cost records with filtering and pagination
Get cost records for a specific team within a time range
List all environments for the caller's team

post.description: Create a new Kubernetes environment with ArgoCD integration

get.description: Get details of a specific environment

delete.description: Tear down an environment and all its resources

get.description: Get the ArgoCD sync and health status for an environment
Get live status of an environment including pod and ArgoCD sync status

post.description: Trigger a manual sync of the ArgoCD application for an environment

get.description: Get all workloads (deployments) and their pods in an environment
Get details of a specific workload in an environment
List all resource quotas with optional filters

post.description: Create a new resource quota for a namespace
Check if a resource request would exceed quota limits

get.description: Get resource quota for a specific namespace
Get current resource usage for a namespace

post.description: Refresh cached resource usage for a namespace

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific quota
List all rightsizing recommendations with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, applied, dismissed, failed)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by recommendation type (scale_down, scale_up, optimal)
parameters.name: recommendation_type

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific recommendation

post.description: Apply the recommended resource changes to the Kubernetes workload
Dismiss a pending recommendation that should not be applied
Restore the workload to its previous resource configuration

get.description: Get a paginated list of roles

post.description: Create a new role with permissions
Assign a role to a user with optional team context
post.summary: Assign a role to a user

post.description: Revoke a role from a user
post.summary: Revoke a role from a user

get.description: Get a specific role by ID
List all teams with pagination
Get details of a specific team
List all members of a team

post.description: Add a member to a team

delete.description: Remove a member from a team

get.description: Get all roles assigned to a user for a specific team
get.summary: Get user's roles in a team

get.description: List all users with pagination
Get details of a specific user
Get all roles assigned to a user
